title: T-004 — demand_forecasts table + RLS + supersession index
prompt:
# T-004 — demand_forecasts table + RLS + supersession index

PRD: 07-PLANNING-EXT-PRD.md §9.5, §4.1.4 manual forecast supersede semantics, §4.2 P2 #1 Prophet
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Introduce `demand_forecasts` table holding manual (P1) and Prophet (P2) forecasts with confidence interval columns, supersession audit (superseded_at NULL = current), and tenant RLS.

## Implementation contract
1. Migration `packages/db/migrations/0073_demand_forecasts.sql`: CREATE TYPE forecast_source ENUM (manual|prophet|d365|overridden), CREATE TABLE demand_forecasts per §9.5 DDL with UNIQUE (tenant_id, product_id, week_iso, source, created_at).
2. Partial index idx_demand_forecasts_current ON (tenant_id, product_id, week_iso) WHERE superseded_at IS NULL.
3. RLS policy.
4. Drizzle schema entry.

## Files
- packages/db/migrations/0073_demand_forecasts.sql [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/demand_forecasts.ts [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/index.ts [modify]
- packages/db/__tests__/demand-forecasts.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given migration 0073 applied, when \d demand_forecasts runs, then all §9.5 columns including yhat_lower/upper, source enum, supersession columns exist
2. Given two rows for same (tenant, product, week, source) with different created_at, when both INSERTed, then both succeed (UNIQUE includes created_at)
3. Given the partial index exists, when a row has superseded_at SET, then it is excluded from the current-forecast index lookup plan

## Test strategy
- RED: write packages/db/__tests__/demand-forecasts.test.ts asserting supersession partial index + source enum + RLS
- Run 'pnpm --filter db migrate && pnpm --filter db test demand-forecasts'

## Risk red lines
- Do not omit the partial index on superseded_at IS NULL (read path depends on it)
- Do not skip RLS
- Do not enforce single-active forecast row at DB layer (P2 supersession is event-based, not unique)

pipeline_inputs.description: Create demand_forecasts table with confidence interval columns, source enum, supersession partial index, RLS.
pipeline_inputs.details: Migration 0073 emits CREATE TYPE forecast_source + CREATE TABLE demand_forecasts per §9.5 DDL. Partial index supports the supersession-aware current-forecast read path. Drizzle schema mirrors columns with NUMERIC(12,2) and NUMERIC(3,2) precisions. RED test verifies enum, partial index, RLS.
acceptance_criteria: Given migration 0073 applied, when \d demand_forecasts runs, then all §9.5 columns including yhat_lower/upper, source enum, superseded_at exist
Given two rows for same (tenant, product, week, source) with different created_at, when both INSERTed, then both succeed
Given partial index, when a row has superseded_at NOT NULL, then idx_demand_forecasts_current excludes it
test_strategy: RED: write packages/db/__tests__/demand-forecasts.test.ts asserting partial index + source enum + RLS
Run 'pnpm --filter db migrate && pnpm --filter db test demand-forecasts'
risk_red_lines: Do not omit partial index on superseded_at IS NULL
Do not enforce single-active forecast row via unique at DB layer
